fields.label: Enable Magento Integration
fields.description: When unchecked, all Magento sync operations (products, orders, inventory, images, status) are paused

fields.label: Enable ERPNext Site Sync
fields.description: When checked, product sync between this site and configured remote ERPNext sites is enabled

fields.label: Inbound Request Signing
fields.description: Hardens incoming Magento push calls with HMAC signing. Use permissive mode first, then enforce after Magento signing is enabled.

fields.label: Verify Signed Magento Push Requests
fields.description: When enabled, ERPNext validates request signatures when signature headers are present.

fields.label: Enforce Signed Requests (Strict)
fields.description: When enabled, unsigned or invalidly signed push requests are rejected.

fields.label: Signature Time Window (seconds)
fields.description: Maximum allowed clock skew for request signatures (default: 300).

fields.label: Shared Signing Secret
fields.description: Shared HMAC secret used to verify Magento push requests.
